{"problem_standardized_math":"For the quadratic function\n\\[\nf(x)=\\frac{1}{2}x^T A x-b^T x,\n\\]\nuse induction to show that, at the end of the outer iteration \\(k\\) of Algorithm 9.3, the directions \\(p_{n-k}, p_{n-k+1}, \\ldots, p_n\\) are conjugate. Then use this fact to show that, if the step lengths \\(\\alpha_i\\) in Algorithm 9.3 are never zero, the iteration terminates at the minimizer of \\((9.25)\\) after at most \\(n\\) outer iterations."}
